appliedUpdates.description: Documented that live Unpaywall DOI smoke returning upstream HTTP 422 should be treated as external instability and validated with deterministic CLI tests plus built-CLI clean-env checks.

frictions.description: A live configured Unpaywall DOI smoke run from the validator working directory returned upstream HTTP 422 despite local credentials being present.
frictions.resolution: Validated VAL-RETRIEVAL-011 with a built-CLI clean-env smoke run for the zero-result path and deterministic CLI test coverage (`TestUnpaywallStandaloneLimits`) for the configured metadata-only path and unsupported retrieval behavior.
